name: Cutting Board
description: Detect edits in the timeline, rate them, and store structured data for model training

commands.name: Start Capture
commands.description: Begin polling the timeline for edit detection

commands.name: Stop Capture
commands.description: Stop polling and show session stats

commands.name: Stats
commands.description: Show edit statistics for the current session

commands.name: Export Training
commands.description: Export quality-weighted training examples as JSONL

commands.name: Export Data
commands.description: Export all cut records as JSON

commands.name: Train Model
commands.description: Train the local autocut neural network from collected edit data

commands.name: Start Autocut
commands.description: Load the trained model and begin real-time edit suggestions

commands.name: Autocut Status
commands.description: Show model stats, accuracy, and current autocut state

commands.name: Accept Suggestion
commands.description: Execute the current autocut suggestion on the timeline
